title: Phase-separated glass compositions
abstract: A borosilicate-based composition, including: 50-85 mol. % SiO2, 10-40 mol. % B2O3, >0-5 mol. % SnO2, and >0-20 mol. % of at least one alkali oxide selected from Li2O, Na2O, K2O, Rb2O, and Cs2O, such that the composition has a Young's Modulus less than 64 GPa.
claims: 1. A borosilicate-based composition, comprising: 50-85 mol % SiO 2 , >15-30 mol % B 2 O 3 , >0-5 mol % SnO 2 , and 5.5-20 mol % R 2 O, where R 2 O is a total amount of Li 2 O, Na 2 O, K 2 O, Rb 2 O, and Cs 2 O, wherein the composition has a Young's Modulus less than 64 GPa, and the borosilicate-based composition is phase separated into a silicate glass and a borate glass.
